# REVENUK ARCHENECT SE*Created: Sunday, December 7, 2025 at 5:11:42?PM*<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/png;base64,"/><br></div>

<div>I am trying to copy and paste different resumes + copy and paste job description so it analyzes both sides where should i make it happen? ALso look under modules the lettering is not working well </div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Needs to be improved:</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>REVENUE ARCHITECT OS</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>? ONLINE</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>? PRIVACY &amp DATA NOTICE</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>? Ingest Data (The Signal)</div>
<div>? SYSTEM MODE: ? Intel</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>? STRATEGIC INTELLIGENCE HUD</div>
<div>? YOUR ARSENAL (Resume + JD)</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>THis section nothing happens when I copy my resume and the job description what should happen if that is the case? </div>
<div>PROTOCOL: Paste your resume on the left, job description on the right. The system will analyze both.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>? YOUR RESUME</div>
<div># ? The Revenue Architect (Ex-Fudo Security, Google, Hewlett Packard, NetApp, SurveyMonkey &amp Sense)</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>**Leon Basin** | Technical GTM Architect</div>
<div>[LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/leonbasin) | [Portfolio](https://basinleon.com)</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>I build data-driven GTM systems that bridge engineering complexity with commercial velocity. My focus is on scaling revenue by eliminating operational friction.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>## ? Key Architectural Wins &amp Metrics</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>These are the verifiable systems I built and scaled, demonstrating the blend of technical rigor and commercial strategy:</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>| Role | Architectural Win | Metric |</div>
<div>| :--- | :--- | :--- |</div>
<div>| **Fudo Security** | Re-architected global outbound motion &amp partner channel. | **160%** YoY Pipeline Increase |</div>
<div>| **Sense (Workforce AI)** | BDR team leadership &amp sales automation framework. | Generated **$10M in pipeline** &amp reduced customer churn by **12%**. |</div>
<div>| **Basin &amp Associates** | Zero-to-One GTM engines for AI/DevSecOps clients. | **$621k** Active Pipeline Generated. |</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>## ? Foundational Rigor &amp Scale (Google Ops, MBA, Field Leadership)</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>My methods are grounded in process rigor and early leadership development:</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>| Foundation | Core Focus | Insight |</div>
<div>| :--- | :--- | :--- |</div>
<div>| **SurveyMonkey** | **Enterprise Portfolio Management.** | Managed a **$300M+ enterprise portfolio** &amp closed **$300K** in expansion revenue. |</div>
<div>| **Sense (Enablement)** | **Social Selling Program Design.** | Increased sales team response rates by **125%**. |</div>
<div>| **Google / NetApp** | Operations Rigor &amp Process Optimization. | Drove a **15% increase** in operational efficiency (Google Shopping launch). |</div>
<div>| **HP / Early Career** | Field Sales Leadership &amp Player-Coach DNA. | Managed and trained a team of **20 associates** in product demonstration. |</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>## ? Current Lab: GTM Signal Architect</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>My active project uses Python and Streamlit to score pipeline signals. It's my internal lab for developing the next generation of GTM strategy.</div>
<div><br></div>

<div><br></div>
<div>? JOB DESCRIPTION</div>
<div>Manager, Business Development</div>
<div>CategorySalesJob IdR162854Posted Date 12/04/2025</div>
<div>Job available in 3 locations </div>
<div>Save job </div>
<div> Back To search results</div>
<div>Our Company</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Changing the world through digital experiences is what AdobeŐs all about. We give everyoneŃfrom emerging artists to global brandsŃeverything they need to design and deliver exceptional digital experiences! WeŐre passionate about empowering people to create beautiful and powerful images, videos, and apps, and transform how companies interact with customers across every screen. </div>
<div><br></div>
<div>WeŐre on a mission to hire the very best and are committed to creating exceptional employee experiences where everyone is respected and has access to equal opportunity. We realize that new ideas can come from everywhere in the organization, and we know the next big idea could be yours!</div>
<div><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div> </div>
<div><br></div>
<div>The Opportunity</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Adobe is looking for a Manager of Business Development who will lead a team of Inside Sales Representatives focused on building a sales pipeline and contributing to revenue growth in the Americas Enterprise segment. In this role, this manager will encourage people to bring their best to Adobe as they learn and deliver sales excellence through account-based sales development practices. This leader will be a mentor in helping reps develop their sales skills, build pipelines, and prepare for a future field sales role.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>What You'll Do</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Lead and develop the sales development team to create top sales pipeline opportunities</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Run day-to-day inside sales operations to ensure processes, policies, and procedures are maintained and improved as needed to drive business efficiencies to the next level</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Carry and drive an individual pipeline quota with your team on a quarterly basis</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Orchestrate inbound and outbound prospecting activities and programs to deliver quality sales pipeline in enterprise target accounts</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Mentor and coach the team with standard methodologies in modern sales prospecting tactics</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Partner with management to drive strategic direction and alignment with sales organization</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Work cross-functionally across the sales and marketing ecosystem to align sales development messaging, plays, and lead qualification standards that ensure lead conversion quality</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Responsible for reporting and communicating to sales management, operations, and marketing organization on key performance metrics, lead conversion trends, and Quarterly Business Reviews on overall program and team performance</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>What you need to succeed</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Passion, Grit, and a desire to WIN!</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>5+ years of lead generation and/or sales experience, carrying a quota</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Develop a &quotBest in Class&quot Business Development team that exceeds a target</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Strong leader who is self-motivated and able to develop employees</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Ability to identify key trends in winning employees and replicate success across the group</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Strong understanding of Business-to-Business customer buying cycles and how to penetrate organizations</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Strong ecosystem management with remote Sales, Sales Operations, and Demand Generation</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Drive consistent lead/meeting qualification increasing overall sales pipeline</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Strong team orientation and ability to build cross-functional relationships</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Focus on the career development of individual team members, helping position them for career advancement</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Ability to innovate within a growing business unit</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Ability to innovate within a growing business unit</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Our compensation reflects the cost of labor across several? U.S. geographic markets, and we pay differently based on those defined markets. The U.S. pay range for this position?is $144,100 -- $267,600 annually. Pay?within this range varies by work location?and may also depend on job-related knowledge, skills,?and experience. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for the job location during the hiring process.</div>
<div>At Adobe, for sales roles starting salaries are expressed as total target compensation (TTC = base + commission), and short-term incentives are in the form of sales commission plans.  Non-sales roles starting salaries are expressed as base salary and short-term incentives are in the form of the Annual Incentive Plan (AIP).</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>In addition, certain roles may be eligible for long-term incentives in the form of a new hire equity award.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>State-Specific Notices:</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>California:</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Fair Chance Ordinances</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Adobe will consider qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records for employment in accordance with state and local laws and Ňfair chanceÓ ordinances.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Colorado:</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Application Window Notice</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Feb 27 2026 12:00 AM</div>
<div>If this role is open to hiring in Colorado (as listed on the job posting), the application window will remain open until at least the date and time stated above in Pacific Time, in compliance with Colorado pay transparency regulations. If this role does not have Colorado listed as a hiring location, no specific application window applies, and the posting may close at any time based on hiring needs.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Massachusetts:</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Massachusetts Legal Notice</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>It is unlawful in Massachusetts to require or administer a lie detector test as a condition of employment or continued employment. An employer who violates this law shall be subject to criminal penalties and civil liability.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Adobe is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on gender, race or color, ethnicity or national origin, age, disability, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other applicable characteristics protected by law. Learn more.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div> </div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Adobe aims to make Adobe.com accessible to any and all users. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation to navigate our website or complete the application process, email accommodations@adobe.com or call (408) 536-3015.</div>

<div><br></div>
<div>Changing the world through digital experiences is what AdobeŐs all about. We give everyoneŃfrom emerging artists to global brandsŃeverything they need to design and deliver exceptional digital experiences! WeŐre passionate about empowering people to create beautiful and powerful images, videos, and apps, and transform how companies interact with customers across every screen. </div>
<div><br></div>

<div>The Opportunity</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Adobe is looking for a Manager of Business Development who will lead a team of Inside Sales Representatives focused on building a sales pipeline and contributing to revenue growth in the Americas Enterprise segment. In this role, this manager will encourage people to bring their best to Adobe as they learn and deliver sales excellence through account-based sales development practices. This leader will be a mentor in helping reps develop their sales skills, build pipelines, and prepare for a future field sales role.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>What You'll Do</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Lead and develop the sales development team to create top sales pipeline opportunities</div>
<div><br></div>

<div><br></div>
<div>Mentor and coach the team with standard methodologies in modern sales prospecting tactics</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Partner with management to drive strategic direction and alignment with sales organization</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Work cross-functionally across the sales and marketing ecosystem to align sales development messaging, plays, and lead qualification standards that ensure lead conversion quality</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Responsible for reporting and communicating to sales management, operations, and marketing organization on key performance metrics, lead conversion trends, and Quarterly Business Reviews on overall program and team performance</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>What you need to succeed</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Passion, Grit, and a desire to WIN!</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>5+ years of lead generation and/or sales experience, carrying a quota</div>
<div><br></div>

<div><br></div>

<div><br></div>

<div><br></div>
